ObjectStates.Name: BlockSquare
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
autoHideSwitch = 0

btparams1 = {
    click_function = "hideObjects",
    function_owner = self,
    label          = "숨기기",
    position       = {0, 1, -0.25},
    rotation       = {0, 0, 0},
    width          = 1100,
    height         = 330,
    font_size      = 180,
    scale          = {0.3, 0.3, 0.3},
    color          = {1, 1, 1},
    font_color     = {0, 0, 0},
    tooltip        = "오브젝트를 숨깁니다.",
}
btparams2 = {
    click_function = "showObjects",
    function_owner = self,
    label          = "보이기",
    position       = {0, 1, 0},
    rotation       = {0, 0, 0},
    width          = 1100,
    height         = 330,
    font_size      = 180,
    scale          = {0.3, 0.3, 0.3},
    color          = {1, 1, 1},
    font_color     = {0, 0, 0},
    tooltip        = "오브젝트를 보이게 합니다.",
}
btparams3 = {
    click_function = "autoHideObjects",
    function_owner = self,
    label          = "자동 숨김",
    position       = {0, 1, 0.25},
    rotation       = {0, 0, 0},
    width          = 1100,
    height         = 330,
    font_size      = 180,
    scale          = {0.3, 0.3, 0.3},
    color          = {1, 1, 1},
    font_color     = {0, 0, 0},
    tooltip        = "계속 오브젝트를 숨깁니다.\n(새로운 오브젝트가 생기거나 description이 변경될 때에도 숨겨짐)",
}

function onLoad(script_state)
    local savedTable = JSON.decode(script_state)

    if savedTable ~= nil then
        if savedTable.AHS ~= nil then
            autoHideSwitch = savedTable.AHS
        end
    end
    if autoHideSwitch == 0 then
        hideObjects(self, 'Black', false)
    end
    self.createButton(btparams1)
    self.createButton(btparams2)
    self.createButton(btparams3)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        AHS = autoHideSwitch
    }
    return JSON.encode(state)
end

function hideObjects(obj, color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then
        return
    end
    if color ~= 'Black' and color ~= nil then
        if Player[color].host == false and Player[color].promoted == false and Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('검정색 플레이어 또는 호스트나 프로모트 플레이어만이 조정할 수 있습니다.')
            return
        end
    end
    
    if autoHideSwitch == 1 then
        if Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 꺼집니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
        end
        autoHideSwitch = 0
    end
    self.setColorTint({0, 0, 1})
    if Player[color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('개인 오브젝트를 숨깁니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
    end
    hideObjects_func()
end

function showObjects(obj, color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then
        return
    end
    if color ~= 'Black' and color ~= nil then
        if Player[color].host == false and Player[color].promoted == false and Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('검정색 플레이어 또는 호스트나 프로모트 플레이어만이 조정할 수 있습니다.')
            return
        end
    end

    local tmpObjects = getObjects()
    local desc
    if autoHideSwitch == 1 then
        if Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 꺼집니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
        end
        autoHideSwitch = 0
    end
    self.setColorTint({0, 0, 0})
    if Player[color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('개인 오브젝트 숨김을 해제합니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
    end
    for i = 1, #tmpObjects do
        desc = string.lower(tmpObjects[i].getDescription())
        if string.find(desc, 'show:') then
            tmpObjects[i].setInvisibleTo({})
        end
    end
end

function autoHideObjects(obj, color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then
        return
    end
    if color ~= 'Black' and color ~= nil then
        if Player[color].host == false and Player[color].promoted == false and Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('검정색 플레이어 또는 호스트나 프로모트 플레이어만이 조정할 수 있습니다.')
            return
        end
    end

    if autoHideSwitch == 0 then
        if Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 켜집니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
        end
        autoHideSwitch = 1
        self.setColorTint({0, 0.5, 0})
    else
        if Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 꺼집니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
        end
        autoHideSwitch = 0
        self.setColorTint({0, 0, 1})
    end
end


function hideObjects_func()
    local tmpObjects = getObjects()
    local desc
    for i = 1, #tmpObjects do
        desc = string.lower(tmpObjects[i].getDescription())
        local allColors = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'}
        local hideColors = {}
        if string.find(desc, 'show:') then
            for j = 1, #allColors do
                if string.find(desc, string.lower(allColors[j])) == nil then
                    hideColors[#hideColors + 1] = allColors[j]
                end
            end
            tmpObjects[i].setInvisibleTo(hideColors)
        end
        -- if string.find(desc, 'show:white') then
        --     showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'White')
        -- elseif string.find(desc, 'show:brown') then
        --     showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Brown')
        -- elseif string.find(desc, 'show:red') then
        --     showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Red')
        -- elseif string.find(desc, 'show:orange') then
        --     showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Orange')
        -- elseif string.find(desc, 'show:yellow') then
        --     showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Yellow')
        -- elseif string.find(desc, 'show:green') then
        --     showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Green')
        -- elseif string.find(desc, 'show:teal') then
        --     showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Teal')
        -- elseif string.find(desc, 'show:blue') then
        --     showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Blue')
        -- elseif string.find(desc, 'show:purple') then
        --     showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Purple')
        -- elseif string.find(desc, 'show:pink') then
        --     showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Pink')
        -- elseif string.find(desc, 'show:black') then
        --     showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Black')
        -- elseif string.find(desc, 'reveal') then
        --     tmpObjects[i].setInvisibleTo({})
        -- end
    end
end


function onFixedUpdate()
    if autoHideSwitch == 1 then
        hideObjects_func()
    end
end

function showToOnly(object, color)
    local allColors = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'}
    for i = 1, 10 do
        if allColors[i] == color then
            allColors[i] = 'Grey'
            break
        end
    end
    object.setInvisibleTo(allColors)
end
ObjectStates.XmlUI:
<Panel active="true" width="1000" height="1000" visibility="Black"
    rectAlignment="MiddleCenter" offsetXY="0 0" scale="0.1 0.1 1" position="0 0 -51" rotation="0 0 180">
    <Text color="#FFFF00" width="180" height="80" offsetXY="-10 0" fontSize="70" rectAlignment="UpperRight">v1.2</Text>
    <!-- <Button onClick="hideObjects" width="600" height="200" offsetXY="0 300" fontSize="100">숨기기</Button>
    <Button onClick="showObjects" width="600" height="200" offsetXY="0 0" fontSize="100">보이기</Button>
    <Button onClick="autoHideObjects" width="600" height="200" offsetXY="0 -300" fontSize="100">자동숨김</Button> -->
    <Text position="0 0 102" rotation="0 180 0" fontSize="50" color="#FFFFFF" width="800" height="800">- 사용법 -
    <textcolor color="#FFBB00">숨기기 원하는 오브젝트 우클릭
    Description 항목 입력</textcolor>
    (show:COLOR 형식으로 입력)

    - 예시 -
    show:white <textsize size="22">(white에게만 보임)</textsize>
    show:brown,red <textsize size="22">(brown, red에게만 보임)</textsize>
    
    색상 목록 : white, brown,
    red, orange, yellow, green,
    teal, blue, purple, pink
    </Text>
</Panel>
